title: dubrueilia sessilifolia
intro: Dubrueilia sessilifolia, also known as Wood Sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. Wood Sorrel has been found to have various health benefits, such as treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and certain types of arthritis. The herbal preparations of Dubrueilia sessilifolia include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of these conditions.
